    <item>
        <guid>nba530726</guid>
        <title>Donovan Mitchell: Paces Cleveland in loss</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/donovan-mitchell-4166</link>
        <description>Mitchell finished Tuesday's 115-104 overtime loss to the Knicks in Game 1 of the Eastern Conference Finals with 29 points (12-23 FG, 4-11 3Pt, 1-1 FT), six steals, five rebounds, three assists and one block across 41 minutes.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Tue, 19 May 2026 8:14:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba530725</guid>
        <title>Jalen Brunson: Takes over late in Game 1 win</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/jalen-brunson-4405</link>
        <description>Brunson totaled 38 points (15-29 FG, 1-6 3Pt, 7-10 FT), six assists, five rebounds and three steals across 46 minutes in Tuesday's 115-104 overtime victory over the Cavaliers in Game 1 of the Eastern Conference Finals.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Tue, 19 May 2026 8:10:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba530720</guid>
        <title>OG Anunoby: Ready for Game 1</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/og-anunoby-4121</link>
        <description>Anunoby (hamstring) is available for Tuesday's Game 1 of the Eastern Conference Finals against the Cavaliers, per James L. Edwards III of The Athletic.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Tue, 19 May 2026 4:36:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba530719</guid>
        <title>De'Aaron Fox: Officially listed as questionable</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/deaaron-fox-4116</link>
        <description>Fox (ankle) is listed as questionable for Wednesday's Game 2 of the Western Conference Finals against the Thunder.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Tue, 19 May 2026 3:21:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba530718</guid>
        <title>De'Aaron Fox: Game-time call for Game 2</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/deaaron-fox-4116</link>
        <description>Fox (ankle) is a game-time decision for Wednesday's Game 2 of the Western Conference Finals against the Thunder, per Tom Orsborn of the San Antonio Express-News.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Tue, 19 May 2026 12:54:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
